channel.title: Two Dad Jokes Daily
channel.description: Two fresh dad jokes every day, delivered by an animated dad. For TikTok and Instagram Reels.

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #62: The Cheapest Concert EVER!
item.description:
What concert costs only 45 cents?
50 cent featuring Nickelback.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260513-2318.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:
What concert costs only 45 cents? 50 cent featuring Nickelback. 👇 rate it 1-10 in comments
🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily
#dadjokefix #dadjoke #dadjokes #aiavatar #aicomedy #cornyjokes #wordplay #dadhumor #shorts #concert #music #nickelback
item.dadjokefix:instagram_caption:
What concert costs only 45 cents?
50 cent featuring Nickelback. 🫥
Drop a number 1-10 in comments — how bad was it?
Follow @dadjokefix for two dad jokes a day.
🤖 Hank is an AI character. Voice, face and animation are all generated. . . . #dadjokefix #dadjoke #dadjokes #aiavatar #aicomedy #cornyjokes #wordplay #dadhumor #shorts #concert #music #nickelback
item.dadjokefix:youtube_caption:
What concert costs only 45 cents?
50 cent featuring Nickelback.
---

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #61: Can I Watch TV?
item.description:
Can I watch the TV?
Dad: Yes, but don’t turn it on.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260513-2005.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
item.dadjokefix:punchline: Dad: Yes, but don’t turn it on.
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:
Can I watch the TV? Dad: Yes, but don’t turn it on. 👇 rate it 1-10 in comments
🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily
#dadjoke #dadjokefix #dadjokes #aicomedy #aigenerated #punsday #groanworthy #shortcomedy #foryou #television #tv #remote

Can I watch the TV?
Dad: Yes, but don’t turn it on. 🫥
Drop a number 1-10 in comments — how bad was it?

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #60: Eye Can't Believe This!
item.description:
How many optometrists does it take to change a light bulb?
1 or 2? 1... or 2?
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260513-1631.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #59: Hens Have a Secret!
item.description:
How do hens stay fit?
They always egg-cercise!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260512-2315.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #58: My Computer FROZE!
item.description:
It was so cold yesterday my computer froze.
My own fault though, I left too many windows open.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260512-2005.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
item.dadjokefix:setup: It was so cold yesterday my computer froze.
item.dadjokefix:punchline: My own fault though, I left too many windows open.
item.dadjokefix:tiktok_caption:

🤖 AI-generated dad (Hank) — fresh joke daily

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #57: Lifesaver Inventor!
item.description:
Did you hear about the guy who invented Lifesavers?
They say he made a mint.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #56: Scaly Smile Showdown!
item.description:
How do you tell the difference between a crocodile and an alligator?
You will see one later and one in a while.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260511-2309.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #55: Protons Have WHAT?
item.description:
Did you know that protons have mass?
I didn't even know they were catholic.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260511-1959.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.dadjokefix:punchline: I didn't even know they were catholic.

item.title: Monday Morning Groans #54: Puzzle Problems!
item.description:
Don’t interrupt someone working intently on a puzzle.
Chances are, you’ll hear some crosswords.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260511-1636.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #53: Waldo's Fashion Secret!
item.description:
Why does Waldo only wear stripes?
Because he doesn't want to be spotted.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260510-2304.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Sunday Funday #52: A cheesy superhero?!
item.description:
Did you hear about the cheese who saved the world?
It was Legend-dairy!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260510-1501.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #51: Frog Facts!
item.description:
Just read a few facts about frogs.
They were ribbiting.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260509-2301.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Weekend Wild Card #50: Cow Questions!
item.description:
Why do cows not have toes?
They lactose!
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260509-1500.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Joke Court Friday #49: Darth Vader's Breakfast?
item.description:
How does Darth Vader like his toast?
On the dark side.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260508-2307.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Joke Court Friday #48: Cooking Advice?
item.description:
My wife told me to rub the herbs on the meat for better flavor.
That's sage advice.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260508-1543.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Throwback Thursday #47: Ladders are Untrustworthy!
item.description:
You can't trust a ladder.
It will always let you down
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260507-2310.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #45: Fireworks and a Car Battery!
item.description:
A police officer caught two kids playing with a firework and a car battery.
He charged one and let the other one off.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260506-2304.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Midweek Dad Joke #44: That Took Awhile!
item.description:
I ate a clock yesterday.
It was so time consuming.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260506-1606.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny

item.title: Punsday Tuesday #43: What a stylish number!
item.description:
What did the 0 say to the 8?
Nice belt.
Follow for two dad jokes a day!
Video: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/energeticcity/youtube-political-pipeline@main/videos/short_v20260505-2308.mp4
#dadjokes #dadjoke #comedy #shorts #funny
